'''鈭歠-m-ch-n''' ('''kafamchenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quartisect|quartisect]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-m-ch-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quartisect|quartisect]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-m-ch-n
|-
! Lemma
| kafamchenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifamchenoko|thifamchenoko]] || [[word:jifamchenoko|jifamchenoko]] || [[word:shifamchenoko|shifamchenoko]] || [[word:kifamchenoko|kifamchenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufamchenoko|thuthufamchenoko]] || [[word:jujufamchenoko|jujufamchenoko]] || [[word:shushufamchenoko|shushufamchenoko]] || [[word:kukufamchenoko|kukufamchenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufamchenoko|thufamchenoko]] || [[word:jufamchenoko|jufamchenoko]] || [[word:shufamchenoko|shufamchenoko]] || [[word:kufamchenoko|kufamchenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufamchenoko|thufamchenoko]] || [[word:jufamchenoko|jufamchenoko]] || [[word:shufamchenoko|shufamchenoko]] || [[word:kufamchenoko|kufamchenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefamchenoko|thefamchenoko]] || [[word:jefamchenoko|jefamchenoko]] || [[word:shefamchenoko|shefamchenoko]] || [[word:kefamchenoko|kefamchenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofamchenoko|thothofamchenoko]] || [[word:jojofamchenoko|jojofamchenoko]] || [[word:shoshofamchenoko|shoshofamchenoko]] || [[word:kokofamchenoko|kokofamchenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofamchenoko|thofamchenoko]] || [[word:jofamchenoko|jofamchenoko]] || [[word:shofamchenoko|shofamchenoko]] || [[word:kofamchenoko|kofamchenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofamchenoko|thofamchenoko]] || [[word:jofamchenoko|jofamchenoko]] || [[word:shofamchenoko|shofamchenoko]] || [[word:kofamchenoko|kofamchenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙famchenoko|th忙famchenoko]] || [[word:j忙famchenoko|j忙famchenoko]] || [[word:sh忙famchenoko|sh忙famchenoko]] || [[word:k忙famchenoko|k忙famchenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafamchenoko|thathafamchenoko]] || [[word:jajafamchenoko|jajafamchenoko]] || [[word:shashafamchenoko|shashafamchenoko]] || [[word:kakafamchenoko|kakafamchenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafamchenoko|thafamchenoko]] || [[word:jafamchenoko|jafamchenoko]] || [[word:shafamchenoko|shafamchenoko]] || [[word:kafamchenoko|kafamchenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafamchenoko|thafamchenoko]] || [[word:jafamchenoko|jafamchenoko]] || [[word:shafamchenoko|shafamchenoko]] || [[word:kafamchenoko|kafamchenoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
